title: Obstetrics and Gynecology
description: 本课程由妇产科16位具有丰富临床教学经验的全国知名专家及中青年教师担任讲授，采用多元化的教学方法及珍贵的临床教学资源，生动形象地讲授16个专题的理论基础和临床知识，帮助学生获得本专业的核心知识及临床思辨能力，为全面提升学生的医学岗位胜任能力奠定坚实的基础。The teaching team of this course consists of 16 nationally famous experts and young teachers who have rich experience in both clinical practice and teaching. Taking diversified approaches and making the best use of valuable clinical teaching resources, they teach both theory and practice of 16 topics in a vivid way, endeavoring to help students acquire core professional knowledge and critical thinking capacity. The goal of this course is to lay a solid foundation for building students’ capacity as medical professionals.
